How to Write a Perfect Friendship Card

30 real friendship messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Friendship Template

1 30 Friendship Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a friendship template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
👯 Thank you for being my friend. Life would suck without you. 💛
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
Best friends forever. No takebacks. You're stuck with me. 😜💕
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
Friendship isn't about who you've known the longest. It's about who walked in and never left. 💙
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
Here's to the friends who became family. Love you guys. 🏡💖
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Good friends are hard to find, harder to leave, and impossible to forget. 🫂✨
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Friendship is the only cement that will ever hold the world together. (And wine.) 🍷😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
To my bestie — you're my person, my sister, my rock. I love you. 💖👯
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
My ride-or-die, my partner in crime, my therapist, my hype woman. Love you, girl. 💗👏
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
To my beautiful friend — you deserve everything good in this world. 💐✨
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
Bestie, you are the sister I got to choose. Love you always. 👯💕
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
Girl, where would I be without your advice, your memes, and your wine nights? Love you tons. 🍷📱💖
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
You're more than a best friend. You're my platonic soulmate. 💞✨
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
Brothers from another mother. Love you, man. 🍻💪🤙
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
To my best guy friend — thank you for the dumb jokes, the real talks, and always having my back. 💙
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Mate, you're my oldest friend and still my favourite. Here's to 50 more years of chaos. 👬🎉
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
Dude, I'd trust you with my life, my secrets, and my last beer. That's real friendship. 🍻💙
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
To my guy — thanks for being the friend who shows up. Always. 🙏🤝
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
We're not friends, we're brothers. That's the binding contract. Love you, bro. 👬💛
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
My sister/bro isn't just family. They're my first and forever best friend. 💞👫
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
Family by blood, friend by choice. I love you, cousin. 👯💛
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
Thank you for being my cousin AND my best friend. Life is better with you in it. 💖✨
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
To my niece/nephew — you're growing up so fast! Always know I'm your cool aunt/uncle AND your friend. 😎💕
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
To my in-laws: you're not just family, you're my new best friends. (Please still like me after reading this.) 😂💗
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
Having you as a brother/sister is the best friendship I never applied for. 👫😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
Cheers to us! The group chat that never sleeps. Love you guys. 📱💙🍻
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
To my squad: when one of us wins, we all win. That's friendship. 🏆💯👥
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
Shoutout to the friends who answer my 2am texts with actual concern, not judgement. 😅📱💛
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
We don't see each other every day, but when we do, it's like no time passed. That's real friendship. 🫂✨
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
To my best friends: I'd fight a bear for you. Maybe a small bear. But I would. 😠🐻😂
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
Thank you, guys. For everything. I'm a better person because I know you. 🙏💞
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Friendship Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Compliment a strength of theirs NOBODY else notices.
  2. 💡 Reference one hard time they got you through (not just the good parties).
  3. 💡 Make a fake legal contract — 'you owe me 3 more decades of friendship, no loopholes'.
  4. 💡 Joke about how you first met (if funny/cringey).
  5. 💡 Use 'ride or die' or 'found family' language if you mean it — platonic love deserves bold words.

3 Bad vs Good: Friendship Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
You're a great friend!
✅ Write this instead
You're not a great friend. You're my FRIEND — the one I call at 4am, the one I hide bodies with, the one who has seen me cry over toast. You're stuck. 💛
❌ Don't write this
Thanks for being my friend.
✅ Write this instead
Thanks for being my friend before the promotion, before the glow-up, before the nice apartment. Thanks for choosing me every time.
❌ Don't write this
Friends forever!
✅ Write this instead
Friends forever and ever and ever. Amen. (Contract signed in blood, non-refundable. You know the rules.) 😜🤝

4 Friendship Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing friendship cards.

Do I have to send a friendship card on their birthday too?

Birthday card = mandatory. Random "I love our friendship" card in July = LEGENDARY. Do it once a year, random date.

Group of friends — group card or individual?

Both! One giant group card for the inside jokes, and one tiny 1:1 from you to them saying the sincere thing nobody else will.

Ex friend — can I send a card after a fight?

Only if you mean it, and don't demand a reply. "I was wrong, I miss you, no pressure to respond. Just wanted you to know." 👌

What makes a friendship card iconic?

Inside joke + 1 specific compliment NOBODY else would ever give them. "Your laugh in serious meetings has saved 4 of my jobs".
